content.fact: Late-era Jedi frequently operate under pressure from Galactic Alliance law, courts, media, and executive authority.
content.injection: When late-era Jedi act publicly, consider legal/political consequences instead of assuming unquestioned Jedi autonomy.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Late post-Endor Legends.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.
